kirundi.household_spending_on_goods_and_servic: Imikoreshereze y'imiryango ku bintu na serivisi. Igice kinini ca GDP.
kirundi.business_spending_on_capital_goods_new: Imikoreshereze y'ubucuruzi ku bintu vy'imari shingiro, ubwubatsi busha, n'impinduka z'ububiko.
kirundi.exports_minus_imports_currently_negati: Ivyoherezwa mu mahanga bikuyemo ibitumizwa. Ubu ni bibi kuri Amerika (igihombo c'ubucuruzi).
kirundi.percentage_change_in_real_gdp_2_3_is_h: Impinduka ku ijana muri GDP nyakuri. 2-3% ni vyiza.
kirundi.measures_average_price_changes_the_mai: Ipima impinduka z'ibiciro impuzandengo. Igipimo nyamukuru c'izamuka ry'ibiciro.
kirundi.interest_rate_banks_charge_each_other_: Inyungu amabanki asaba ayandi. Igikoresho nyamukuru ca Fed.
kirundi.survey_of_how_optimistic_consumers_fee: Ubushakashatsi ku kuntu abaguzi bafite icizere ku bukungu.
kirundi.number_of_new_residential_construction: Umubare w'imishinga misha y'ubwubatsi bw'amazu yatangiye.
kirundi.exports_minus_imports_surplus_positive: Ivyoherezwa mu mahanga bikuyemo ibitumizwa. Umurengera = vyiza, igihombo = bibi.
kirundi.total_government_borrowing_us_debt_is_: Igiteranyo c'inguzanyo za guverinoma. Umwenda wa Amerika ni hafi $34 tiriliyoni (2024).
kirundi.plots_interest_rates_vs_bond_maturity_: Igaragaza ibipimo vy'inyungu ku gihe c'ubwishu bw'impapuro. Guhindura = ikimenyetso c'igabanuka.
kirundi.survey_of_manufacturing_activity_50_ex: Ubushakashatsi ku bikorwa vy'inganda. >50 = kwaguka, <50 = kugabanuka.
kirundi.the_most_popular_simple_budgeting_fram: Uburyo bworoshe bw'ingengo y'imari buzwi cane.
kirundi.why_doesn_t_gas_demand_drop_as_much_as: Kuki ibisabwa vya lisansi bitagabanuka nkuko wabitekereza?
kirundi.why_does_raising_rates_hurt_stocks: Kuki kuzamura ibipimo vy'inyungu vyangiza imigabane?
kirundi.what_is_the_most_likely_long_term_effe: Ni iyihe ngaruka y'igihe kirekire ishoboka cane?
kirundi.what_is_the_true_cost_of_grad_school: Ni iki igiciro nyakuri c'ishure ryisumbuye?
kirundi.price_rises_less_demanded_more_supplie: Igiciro kizamuka → ibisabwa bike, itangwa ryinshi. Igiciro kigabanuka → ibisabwa vyinshi, itangwa rike. Uburinganire: aho itangwa rihura n'ibisabwa.
kirundi.gdp_c_i_g_x_m_consumption_investment_g: GDP = C + I + G + (X−M). Ikoreshwa + Ishoramari + Guverinoma + Ivyoherezwa mu mahanga bibumvye. Ipima igiteranyo c'umusaruro w'ubukungu.
kirundi.demand_pull_too_much_money_chasing_goo: Gukurura ibisabwa: amafaranga menshi cane akurikira ibintu. Gusunika igiciro: igiciro c'umusaruro kizamuka. Vyubatswe imbere: kwitega urwego rw'umushahara-igiciro.
kirundi.interest_rates_ffr_open_market_operati: Ibipimo vy'inyungu (FFR) • Ibikorwa vy'isoko rifunguye (kugura/kugurisha impapuro) • Ibisabwa vy'ububiko • Idirisha ry'igabanywa • Uburongozi bw'imbere
kirundi.fiscal_congress_tax_spend_monetary_fed: Imisoro = Kongere (umusoro/imikoreshereze). Amafaranga = Fed (ibipimo vy'inyungu/itangwa ry'amafaranga). Vyombi bigira ingaruka ku bukungu mu buryo butandukanye.
kirundi.divide_72_by_the_interest_rate_to_find: Gabanya 72 ku gipimo c'inyungu kugira ngo umenye imyaka amafaranga yawe azikuba kabiri. 72 ÷ 8% = imyaka 9 kugira ngo yikube kabiri.
kirundi.canvas_summary_supply_demand: Igishushanyo c'itangwa-ibisabwa kigaragaza ibisabwa, itangwa, igiciro c'uburinganire, ingano y'uburinganire, umurengera, kubura, n'ingaruka z'umusoro.
kirundi.canvas_summary_personal_finance: Igishushanyo c'imari bwite kigaragaza ingengo y'imari ya buri kwezi nk'igishushanyo c'uruziga n'iteganya ry'iyongera ry'inyungu ihurizwa.
kirundi.canvas_summary_stock_market: Igishushanyo c'isoko ry'imigabane kigaragaza amateka y'igiciro c'isosiyete yatoranyijwe, amafaranga ya porefeye, ubwigenge, n'agaciro k'ubu.
kirundi.canvas_summary_stock_market_empty: Ahantu h'igishushanyo c'imigabane hiteguye isoko ryakozwe. Tangura isimubula ry'isoko kugira ngo urabe amateka y'igiciro n'ubwigenge.
kirundi.canvas_summary_macro: Dashboard y'ubukungu bw'igihugu igaragaza iyongera rya GDP, izamuka ry'ibiciro, igipimo c'inyungu, igipimo c'ubushomeri, uburinganire bw'ubucuruzi, n'amateka ya politiki.
kirundi.canvas_summary_inquiry: Uburyo bwo kugenzura politiki bukoresha ibikoresho bine vya politiki kugira ngo bugereho ibisubizo vya makoro vyoroshe. Koresha imirongo ya politiki hepfo kugereranya impinduka muri GDP, izamuka ry'ibiciro, n'ubushomeri.
kirundi.teacher_prompt_supply_demand: Saba abanyeshure guhanura nimba igiciro, ingano, umurengera, canke kubura bihinduka mbere yo kwimura silayidi.
kirundi.teacher_prompt_personal_finance: Saba abanyeshure kuvuga impinduka imwe mu ngengo y'imari n'impamvu imwe yo gutangura inyungu ihurizwa hakiri kare bituma unyungura.
kirundi.teacher_prompt_stock_market: Saba abanyeshure gutandukanya imigendekere y'igiciro, ishingiro ry'ubucuruzi, n'ivyago vya porefeye mu gusigura kumwe.
kirundi.teacher_prompt_entrepreneur: Saba abanyeshure kugereranya umubare w'ibikombe kugira ngo bagere ku buringanire mbere yo kwugurura ubucuruzi ku munsi umwe.
kirundi.teacher_prompt_macro: Saba abanyeshure gutoranya intego imwe ya politiki no kumenya igipimo kizerekana iterambere canke igihombo.
kirundi.teacher_prompt_inquiry: Baza abanyeshure ni iyihe ikoresho rya politiki abahanga mu bukungu bazatandukanira cane, hanyuma basigure impamvu icitegererezo ari ugereranya gusa.
kirundi.demand_slopes_down_cheap_buy_more_supp: Ibisabwa bija hepfo (bihendutse = gura vyinshi); itangwa rija hejuru (bihenze = kora vyinshi). Igiciro n'ingano vy'uburinganire biri aho bihura. «Ubutunzi bw'Amahanga» (1776) vya Adam Smith biracari urufatiro.
kirundi.50_30_20_needs_wants_save_compound_int: 50/30/20: ibikenewe / ivyifuzwa / kubitsa. Inyungu ihurizwa ni igitangaza ca munani; kuri 7%, gutangura imyaka 30 hakiri kare bihindura $1 kuba $7.61. Ishura ikarita y'inguzanyo yose — inyungu 19%/umwaka ni igipimo c'ubukungeri.
kirundi.buy_a_share_own_a_slice_of_the_company: Gura umugabane umwe = kugira igice c'isosiyete. S&P 500 yatanze inyungu impuzandengo ya hafi 10%/umwaka mu myaka 100. Tandukanya (ntugerekeze ku mugabane umwe), fata igihe kirekire (igihe mu isoko kiruta guhanura igihe c'isoko).
kirundi.revenue_costs_profit_break_even_point_: Amafaranga yinjira − igiciro = inyungu. Agace k'uburinganire ni igihe ibiciro bihamye vyishuwe. Ubucuruzi buto bwinshi bunanirwa mu mwaka wa 5; abarokotse babonye guhuza igicuruzwa-isoko. Igiciro co kubona umukiriya (CAC) n'agaciro k'ubuzima (LTV) ni imibare ya buri munsi y'uwashinze.
kirundi.gdp_measures_total_output_cpi_measures: GDP ipima igiteranyo c'umusaruro; Umubare w'Ibiciro vy'Abaguzi upima izamuka ry'ibiciro; ubushomeri bukoresha U-3 nk'ishingiro. Fed ishiraho ibipimo vy'inyungu kugira ngo iringanize iyongera n'izamuka ry'ibiciro — inshingano ebyiri Kongere yayihaye muri 1977.
kirundi.play_the_simulations_to_discover_econo: Kina simulasiyo kugira ngo uvumbure ivyiyumviro vy'ubukungu! Buri kintu cigisha iciyumviro gisha kandi kongerwa hano.
kirundi.see_how_inflation_erodes_purchasing_po: Raba uko izamuka ry'ibiciro rigabanya imbaraga zo kugura mu gihe. Dolari imwe y'uyu munsi ifite agaciro kurusha dolari imwe y'ejo!
kirundi.compound_interest_is_the_eighth_wonder: «Inyungu ihurizwa ni igitangaza ca munani c'isi.» — Albert Einstein (baravuga)
kirundi.economists_disagree_different_schools_: Abahanga mu bukungu ntibemeranya! Amashure atandukanye atanga ibisubizo bitandukanye ku bibazo bimwe. Kumenya izi ndebe bigufasha kwiyumvira mu buryo bukiranuka ku politiki y'ubukungu.
kirundi.markets_range_from_perfect_competition: Amasoko atangura ku ipiganwa ryuzuye (abacuruzi benshi, ibicuruzwa bimwe) kugeza ku bwigenge (umucuruzi umwe, igicuruzwa cihariye). Fyonda kuri buri kimwe wige vyinshi:
kirundi.gross_domestic_product_measures_the_to: Umusaruro w'Igihugu upima igiteranyo c'agaciro k'ibintu na serivisi zose za nyuma zakozwe mu mbibi z'igihugu mu mwaka runaka. Kuri Amerika, bigabanywa gutya:
kirundi.as_price_quantity_demanded_consumers_b: Uko igiciro ↑, ingano isabwa ↓. Abaguzi bagura bike igihe igiciro kizamuka. Umurongo w'ibisabwa uja hepfo.
kirundi.as_price_quantity_supplied_producers_m: Uko igiciro ↑, ingano itangwa ↑. Abakora bakora vyinshi igihe igiciro kiri hejuru. Umurongo w'itangwa uja hejuru.
kirundi.where_supply_meets_demand_this_e_point: Aho itangwa rihura n'ibisabwa. Iyi «E» ishiraho igiciro c'isoko (P*) n'ingano (Q*) mu buryo bwikora.
kirundi.changing_the_price_moves_along_a_curve: Guhindura igiciro ni imigendekere ku murongo. Ibintu vyo hanze (ikoranabuhanga, amafaranga yinjira, ivyifuzwa) vyimura umurongo wose.
kirundi.demand_shifted_right_more_people_want_: ▶ Ibisabwa vyimukiye iburyo — abantu benshi bashaka iki gicuruzwa (ahari amafaranga yinjira yazamutse, canke ikimenyetso cagituma kizwi). Ibi bizamura igiciro n'ingano vy'uburinganire vyombi.
kirundi.demand_shifted_left_fewer_people_want_: ▶ Ibisabwa vyimukiye ibumoso — abantu bake bashaka iki gicuruzwa (igisimburwa cahendutse, canke ivyifuzwa vyahindutse). Igiciro n'ingano bigabanuka vyombi.
kirundi.supply_shifted_right_producers_can_mak: ▶ Itangwa ryimukiye iburyo — abakora bashobora gukora bihendutse (ikoranabuhanga risha, igiciro co hasi c'ivyinjijwe). Igiciro kigabanuka, ariko ingano yiyongera.
kirundi.goods_luxury_items_products_with_subst: ibintu (ibintu vy'ubunini, ibicuruzwa bifite ibisimburwa) bibona igabanuka rinini ry'ibisabwa ku iyongera rito ry'igiciro.
kirundi.goods_necessities_like_medicine_gasoli: ibintu (ibikenewe nk'imiti, lisansi) bigumana ibisabwa bihamye uko igiciro caba kimeze kose.
kirundi.lower_monthly_cost_flexibility: Igiciro co hasi ca buri kwezi, guhinduka
kirundi.describe_what_kind_of_market_you_want_: Sigura ubwoko bw'isoko ushaka gucuruzamo. AI izakora amasosiyete 5 y'ibihimbano afite amafaranga nyakuri.
kirundi.e_g_renewable_energy_startups_gaming_c: urugero «amasosiyete masha y'ingufu zishobora kuvugururwa», «amasosiyete y'imikino», «inganda z'ikirere», canke siga ubusa ku ivange...
kirundi.reset_market_generate_new_companies: ♻ Subiza isoko kandi ukore amasosiyete masha
kirundi.type_any_business_idea_and_ai_will_gen: Andika iciyumviro cose c'ubucuruzi kandi AI izakora igiciro cawe c'itangura, ikoreshwa rya buri munsi, n'ibiciro. Hanyuma uyicunge umunsi ku wundi!
kirundi.growth_strong_but_inflation_spiking_ce: Iyongera rikomeye ariko izamuka ry'ibiciro ririyongera. Banki nkuru ishobora gufyonda feri cane.
kirundi.gdp_up_inflation_contained_goldilocks_: GDP hejuru, izamuka ry'ibiciro rikurikiranywe. Agace keza — kiramvye kuri ubu.
kirundi.small_net_effect_policy_levers_roughly: Ingaruka nyakuri nto. Ibikoresho vya politiki bihanagurana hafi.
kirundi.policy_inquiry_predict_the_macro_outco: 🔬 Kugenzura politiki — Hanura ibisubizo vya makoro
kirundi.move_four_policy_levers_tax_govt_spend: Yimura ibikoresho bine vya politiki (umusoro, imikoreshereze ya guverinoma, igipimo c'inyungu, umusoro w'ibitumizwa). Hanura imiterere ya makoro mbere yo kubisoma. Nta manota, nta kwerekana.
kirundi.your_hypothesis_which_lever_has_the_mo: Iciyumviro cawe (mu buzima nyakuri, ni ikihe kikoresho abahanga mu bukungu batandukanira cane? Kubera iki?)
kirundi.what_combination_produces_stagflation_: Ni ihe ivange rikora «guhagarara-kuzamuka»? Kubera iki ryababaje cane muri politiki mu myaka ya 1970?
kirundi.tax_cuts_and_govt_spending_both_stimul: Kugabanya umusoro n'imikoreshereze ya guverinoma vyombi bikangura GDP. Ni ikihe gikora izamuka ry'ibiciro ryinshi kuri buri dolari yo gukangura? Kubera iki?
kirundi.do_tariffs_help_domestic_workers_in_th: Ese umusoro w'ibitumizwa ufasha abakozi bo mu gihugu mu gihe kirekire, canke uzamura ibiciro ku bantu bose? Vyombi? Impinduka iri he?
kirundi.this_widget_hard_codes_textbook_keynes: Iyi widget ishiraho mu buryo buhamye ibimenyetso vya Keynes vyo mu gitabo. Mu bukungu bw'uruhande rw'itangwa, ni ibihe bimenyetso bihinduka? Munsi ya MMT? Munsi y'ubukungu bwa neoklasike (kwitega gushize mu gaciro)? Aho icitegererezo ca Keynes gitanga ikimenyetso kibi iyo bigereranyije n'amakuru y'isi nyakuri?
kirundi.i_can_explain_why_this_policy_mix_yiel: Nshobora gusigura impamvu iri vange rya politiki rikora iyi miterere y'ubukungu bwa makoro.
kirundi.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Widget yo kugenzura — nta manota, nta kwerekana, nta gusuka ibisubizo. Imibare ni ibigereranyo vyo kwigisha, si icitegererezo ca makoro nyakuri; ibisubizo nyakuri biterwa na sisitemu y'amafaranga, ubushobozi budakoreshwa, ivyitezwe, n'ubucuruzi bwo hanze. Ubukungu bwa makoro ni impaka — abahanga mu bukungu batandukanira ku kimenyetso n'ingano vyombi.
kirundi.canvas_probe_hint: Fyonda igishushanyo — canke ugitoranye hanyuma ukoreshe utubuto tw'imyambi — kugira ngo urabe agaciro k'umuguzi ugereranyije n'ikiguzi c'umukora ku ngano iyo ari yo yose.
kirundi.canvas_summary_business_empty: Ahantu ha dashboard y'ubucuruzi. Tangura ubucuruzi hepfo kugira ngo urabe amafaranga, isura nziza, n'inyungu ya buri munsi hano.
kirundi.literacy_tooltip: Ubumenyi bw'ubukungu bwiyongera hamwe n'ivyiyumviro wize, imyaka wakoresheje muri za simulasiyo, ukuri kw'ibizamini, n'ivyagezweho wabonye
kirundi.try_supply_demand: Gerageza: shiraho Igiciro co hejuru ca $30 (kugenzura ubukode). Hanura mbere — isoko rizabura ibice bingahe?
kirundi.try_entrepreneur: Gerageza: rondera aho ugera ku buringanire mbere yo kwugurura, hanyuma ugerageze igiciro kirenzeho 50% ku munsi umwe. Ni iki cabaye ku nyungu?
kirundi.glossary_copied: Inkoranyamagambo yakoporowe — uyishire mu nyandiko zawe
kirundi.supply_flatter: — ugororotse kurushaho, GUHINDUKA KWINSHI: abakora bashobora kwongera canke kugabanya umusaruro vyoroshe (ibicuruzwa vy'inganda).
kirundi.cash_flow_warning: ⚠️ Amafaranga yawe ari munsi ya zeru — urakoresha kurusha uko winjiza. Gerageza inzu ihendutse, ijanisha rito ry'ishoramari, canke kwishura umwenda mbere y'uko wiyongera.
kirundi.report_spend_up_2: % vya GDP yongereye ibisabwa (ikuba rya Keynes) — ariko igihombo kigomba kuzishurwa amaherezo.
kirundi.real_rate_negative: Ibipimo nyakuri biri munsi ya zeru bisigura ko abaguza batsinda naho ababitsa bahomba — biratera imbaraga cane.
kirundi.macro_model_disclaimer: Icitegererezo coroheje gifite ibimenyetso vya Keynes vyo mu bitabo hamwe n'ubushomeri bw'itegeko rya Okun — SI iteganyagihe. Ubukungu nyakuri buterwa n'ivyitezwe, icizere, n'imiterere y'isi, kandi abahanga mu bukungu baratandukanira koko kuri ibi bipimo (raba «Amashure y'ivyiyumviro vy'ubukungu» mu bikoresho vy'ikimenyetso).
